changelog: PHASE 2 (DEV ONLY): New 'PPV & LIVE SPORTS' home page sits right under Discovery in the page pager. Cinematic auto-rotating hero shows top upcoming games + PPV events, league pills bar lets you filter by All / Live / PPV / NHL / MLB / NBA / NFL / MLS / etc., huge readable game cards (360 dp wide) with team badges, scores, and a 'WATCH ON SPORTSNET ONE' channel chip. Tap any card to jump straight into your live channel. Games you can't watch on your subscription are hidden entirely (per spec).
Backend: TheSportsDB Business + smart 60-mapping Canadian broadcaster seed (Phase 1, already live).
Mirror: 189 team logos served from hushtv.xyz/sports/teams/ for instant loads (no slow CDN waits).
OFFICIAL channel held at v1.43.99 — Sports rolls out to Dev only until you confirm Phase 2 + Phase 3 are working end-to-end.
